headline: Assurant to Announce First Quarter 2026 Financial Results
summary: ATLANTA, April 06, 2026--Assurant, Inc. (NYSE: AIZ), a premier global protection company that safeguards and services connected devices, homes and automobiles in partnership with the world’s leading brands, will release first quarter 2026 financial results on Tuesday, May 5, 2026, after the market closes. The news release will be available on Assurant's website at www.assurant.com. In conjunction with the news release, Assurant will host a conference call the following morning, Wednesday, May 6,

headline: Morgan Stanley Maintains Equal-Weight on Assurant, Lowers Price Target to $240
summary: Morgan Stanley  analyst Bob Huang   maintains Assurant (NYSE:AIZ) with a Equal-Weight and lowers the price target from $248 to $240.

raw.headline: Morgan Stanley Maintains Equal-Weight on Assurant, Lowers Price Target to $240

headline: How The Assurant (AIZ) Story Is Shifting As Analysts Fine Tune Price Targets
summary: Assurant’s latest analyst update includes a US$9 trim to the price target, even though the modelled fair value remains steady at US$261.33. Analysts describe this as a fine-tuning move tied to refreshed assumptions, rather than a reset of the long-term story. This distinction can matter for how you interpret the shift. Read on to see what is driving the evolving narrative around Assurant and how to keep track of future updates. Stay updated as the Fair Value for Assurant shifts by adding it...
